name: Meta Tag Generator
description: Generate SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards. Preview how your site looks on Google & social media.
keywords: meta tag generator, seo meta tags, open graph generator, twitter card generator, html meta tags
howToUse: 1. Enter page title & description 2. Add URL & image 3. See Google/Facebook/Twitter preview 4. Copy HTML code
faq: Q: What are meta tags? A: HTML tags for SEO & social sharing. Q: Character limits? A: Title 60, Desc 160.
